series_metadata.series_title: Human Trafficking Incident Statistics and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 109.66, these records concern the required annual reporting of human trafficking statistics from local law enforcement to the Ohio Attorney General''s Bureau of Criminal Investigation (AGO BCI) for an annual report to be published by the AGO. Records include, but are not limited to, human trafficking reports extracted from Ohio Law Enforcement Gateway (OHLEG), information and updates from the Ohio Human Trafficking Commission, correspondence with local law enforcement on reporting requirements, and annual reports from the AGO.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from final report publication, fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements, and no more administrative value. ; Paper: from final report publication, fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements, and no more administrative value, unless scanned and saved electronically
